title: ophioglossum vulgatum var. costatum
intro: Ophioglossum vulgatum var. costatum, also known as the common adder's tongue fern, is a variety of the adder's tongue fern, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Ophioglossum. The medicinal properties of Ophioglossum vulgatum var. costatum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antibacterial agent, making it useful in treating skin conditions and infections. The herbal preparations of Ophioglossum vulgatum var. costatum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
